# Combine Orders

Two separate orders placed in under the same hour to the same address can be combined into one shipment on ask for, which saves a second delivery fee. Combined orders ship only when every product across both orders is in stock, so a backordered product delays the entire combined shipment.

[Source: order_management.md#combine-orders]
